unexpected_finds.subject: Route F substrate-paste mathematical-content discipline (H4 absorption byproduct)
unexpected_finds.description: QA H4 finding surfaced a structural pattern: substrate-paste protocols that request only TOC + abstract + section headings can lead synth to elevate route status on bibliographic-existence evidence rather than mathematical-content evidence. Generalisation candidate: any future relay envelope that requests literature paste re-fires for evaluating a candidate mechanism should specify the *type* of mathematical content needed (formulas / classification tables / explicit Weyl actions / parameter relations) rather than relying on TOC navigation alone. Surfaced for amendment to standing relay-prompt-drafting SOP at next T1 Synth W21 LANE-1 cadence.

unexpected_finds.subject: TIER 0/1/2/3/4 cascade-precedence pattern as reusable template
unexpected_finds.description: B1 absorption produced a TIER 0/1/2/3/4 precedence pattern for verdict-cascade tables: TIER 0 = substrate-side disputes (highest precedence; if disputed, downstream tiers do not fire); TIER 1 = substrate-insufficient outcomes routed to paste protocols; TIER 2 = parallel-hedge outcomes with explicit semantics per cross-question status; TIER 3 = single-route GO outcomes; TIER 4 = path-delta / governance / defer-to-acquisition fallbacks. This precedence pattern resolved a recurring class of cascade-table ambiguity that has appeared in multiple envelopes (069r2, 071, 102 V2). Candidate for reuse in any future multi-question synth envelope with cascade-table outputs.

unexpected_finds.subject: 111-EXEC tautology prevention via anti-tautology checklist (i)-(iv)
unexpected_finds.description: Q3 anti-tautology checklist absorbed from 111-EXEC TAUTOLOGY_CONFIRMED_VERDICT_DEMOTED finding pattern: synth must screen any positive-substrate-paste evaluation through (i) parameter usage check (does the inversion function actually use its declared inputs?); (ii) docstring acknowledgment scan (does the source-side documentation acknowledge identity-on-cited behavior?); (iii) literal-constant assignment check (are extracted values upstream-computed or literal mpf() constructors?); (iv) sentinel mutation thought-experiment (would mutating cited constants change extracted values?). This 4-point screen prevents synth from elevating route status based on tautological substrate -- a failure mode 111-EXEC made operationally explicit in the static-audit context.

unexpected_finds.subject: 3-source evidence distinction in Q4 (elimination / compatibility / positive-substrate)
unexpected_finds.description: Q4 verdict bins (Q4_GO_ROUTE_F / Q4_HEDGE_ROUTE_F / Q4_NO_GO_ROUTE_F) now require synth to distinguish three evidence types: (i) ELIMINATION PRESSURE -- Routes B/D ruled out + Route C governance-deferred + Route A undermined by 058R partial-only -> Route F by elimination; (ii) HYPOTHESIS COMPATIBILITY -- Route F mechanism (c) D_6^(1) Sakai surface-type machinery is consistent with 058R Phase B.5 W((2A_1)^(1)) cross-walk; (iii) POSITIVE SAKAI/KNY/D_6^(1) CONSTRUCTIVE SUBSTRATE -- not yet inlined; available on operator paste per §10. Q4_GO_ROUTE_F requires evidence type (iii); Q4_HEDGE_ROUTE_F permits resting on (i) + (ii) when (iii) is pending. This distinction prevents over-inflation of Route F status on elimination-only or hypothesis-only grounds.

unexpected_finds.subject: rubber-duck pre-fire QA discipline now quadruple-vindicated within 7-day window
unexpected_finds.description: Pre-fire rubber-duck QA cycle now has four vindicating cases within 2026-05-06 to 2026-05-08 ~7-day window: (1) 068 Phase A.0 Q.SUP=YES supersession gate caught fire-order race (~3-4 hr saved); (2) 069r2 namespace collision (Path α/β/γ/δ vs Route A/B/C/D/E rename forced by 069r1 namespace reuse); (3) 070 picture v1.20 LATE-FIRE PREFLIGHT v1->v2 absorption (M1-M4 operational metrics replaced raw verdict-count thresholds); (4) 111 v1->v2 full rewrite (empirically-falsified reverse-engineer premise replaced by static-audit + verdict-demotion scope); and now (5) 112 v1->v2 14-finding absorption (1 BLOCKING + 5 HIGH + 6 MEDIUM + 2 NICE). Pattern is operationally robust as a pre-fire gate for non-trivial T1-Synth dispatches. Memory candidate: amendment to standing relay-prompt-drafting SOP recommending mandatory rubber-duck pre-fire QA for any envelope citing >=3 prior bridge artifacts as substrate (where namespace-reuse, premise-drift, or scope-overreach risk is elevated).
